heading: Applicability of requirements regarding confidentiality, informed consent, and counseling
label: 300ff–63 Applicability of requirements regarding confidentiality, informed consent, and counseling
text: The Secretary may not make a grant under this part unless the applicant for the grant agrees that, with respect to testing for HIV/AIDS, any such testing carried out by the applicant with funds appropriated through this chapter will be carried out in accordance with conditions described in sections 300ff–61 and 300ff–62 of this title.
